name: Stir-Fried Vegetables with Tofu
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the sesame oil in a wok over medium-high heat.
2. Add the bell peppers and celery; stir-fry until the celery is just softened.
3. Stir in the garlic and cook for about 30 seconds more.
4. Add the mung bean sprouts, scallions, and sunflower seeds. Continue to stir-fry until the sprouts are wilted and all vegetables are tender-crisp.
5. Stir in the remaining ingredients: dry sherry, tamari, ginger, tofu cubes, and chopped scallions. Cook for an additional 2 minutes over moderate heat.
6. Serve hot over grains or noodles.
